channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: [Guide] How to Bypass the Windows Security Warning to Play CIDER
item.description: In our previous update, we introduced the "Void Card" system, which lies at the core of this game’s mechanics. We are incredibly grateful to see the number of downloads steadily increasing....

item.title: Bernie Sanders and AOC propose a ban on data center construction
item.description: Senator Bernie Sanders and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez introduced companion legislation to halt construction on new data centers until Congress passes comprehensive AI regulation.

item.title: LLM Non-Determinism: What Providers Guarantee, and How to Build Around It
item.description: This post is based on sections 3--5 of "Understanding why deterministic output from LLMs is nearly impossible" by Shuveb Hussain at Unstract (Oct. 2025). The material has been rewritten and...

item.title: How to Find Divisors in Python, Java, and JavaScript
item.description: What is a Divisor? A divisor is a number that divides another number completely without leaving a remainder. For example: Divisors of 10 → 1, 2, 5, 10 Flowchart Logic The flowchart follows these...

item.title: Vercel vs Hetzner in 2026: Which Is Actually Worth It for Solo Developers?
item.description: Originally published at devtoolpicks.com A tweet blew up this week asking a simple question: why do developers still pay for Vercel when a €3.79/month Hetzner VPS exists? Nine thousand developers...

item.title: DB-TASK-002
item.description: Get all movies that have rental rate greater than 3 SELECT * FROM film WHERE rental_rate > 3; I used this to filter movies which are costly rental movies. Movies rental rate > 3 and replacement...

item.title: I Built a Free PDF Toolkit in Go + Astro — Here's What I Learned
item.description: Every few months I find myself needing to merge two PDFs or pull a few pages out of a big document. I open a search, find a tool, and immediately get hit with "sign up to continue" or "buy premium...

item.title: WLBS + MoE: Finally, an AI that learns where the bug really lives
item.description: You’ve seen this happen. An AI coding agent tries to fix an ImportError in rbac.py. It edits the file three times, five times, ten times. Nothing works. The real bug is in roles.py—the file that...

item.title: Building a Production-Aware AI Backend with FastAPI
item.description: Most AI backend examples stop at one thing: send a prompt, get a response. That is fine for demos, but real systems usually need more than that. Once you try to use AI inside an actual product, a...

item.title: The TSA is broken — is privatization next?
item.description: KC Guidry usually gets to the airport two hours before a flight to give herself enough time to get through security. But she knew her flight on the morning of Monday, March 23, out of Houston's...

item.title: Idempotency Situation
item.description: The problem is Same transaction may be executed multiple times This can happen due to network retry or duplicate request This may lead to wrong balances Initial Data Alice has 1000 Bob has 500...

item.title: How to Verify US Business Entities Across States Without Paying $500/mo for an API
item.description: If you work in compliance, sales, or risk, you've probably needed to verify whether a business is actually registered, who its officers are, or when it was formed. The commercial APIs that do this...

item.title: Cox Communications not liable for pirated music, Supreme Court rules
item.description: The Supreme Court has issued its ruling in a lengthy copyright battle between Cox Communications and major record labels, determining that the cable and internet service provider isn't responsible...

item.title: Seiko resurrected a 44-year-old digital watch NASA astronauts wore to space
item.description: The Omega Speedmaster Professional, worn by Buzz Aldrin during the Apollo 11 lunar landing, is the most recognized watch to go to space. But the Seiko Rotocall, featuring a unique design that made...

item.title: Google launches Lyria 3 Pro music generation model
item.description: Google is launching Lyria 3 Pro, an upgraded music model that generates longer, more customizable tracks, as it expands AI music tools across Gemini, enterprise products, and other services.

item.title: Reddit takes on the bots with new ‘human verification’ requirements for fishy behavior
item.description: Reddit will require suspected automated accounts to verify they’re human, as it ramps up efforts to curb bot-driven spam and manipulation.

item.title: Reddit accounts with ‘fishy’ bot-like behavior will soon need to prove they’re human
item.description: Reddit is taking new steps to identify bots on the platform - a process that may require some users to confirm that they're human. In a post on Wednesday, Reddit CEO Steve Huffman writes that the...

item.title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
item.description: Google Lyria teaser

item.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more Google products
item.description: Sizzle video showing new capabilities from Lyria 3 Pro

item.title: Google Lyria 3 Pro makes longer AI songs
item.description: Google is expanding the capabilities of its Lyria 3 music-making AI, enabling it to create tracks up to three minutes long and from within multiple other Google Products. Until now, Lyria had been...

item.title: Live-service games are such a mess even Fortnite is struggling
item.description: For years, major game publishers and developers have been chasing a particular north star: Fortnite. With its internet-shaking live events and copious celebrity cameos, Epic's battle royale...

item.title: Senate Democrats are trying to ‘codify’ Anthropic’s red lines on autonomous weapons and mass surveillance
item.description: Anthropic's fight with the Pentagon is expanding to Congress. Sen. Adam Schiff (D-CA) is working on a new bill to "codify" Anthropic's red lines and ensure humans make the ultimate decisions in...

item.title: Why this battery company is pivoting to AI
item.description: Qichao Hu doesn’t mince words about how he sees the state of the battery industry. “Almost every Western battery company has either died or is going to die. It’s kind of the reality,” he says. Hu...

item.title: You can install these wireless security cameras over half a mile away
item.description: First announced earlier this year at CES 2026, Xthings is planning to release two new long-range wireless security camera kits sometime in the second quarter of this year, with pricing ranging...

item.title: OpenAI Enters Its Focus Era by Killing Sora
item.description: As the ChatGPT-maker eyes an IPO, it's ditching Sora in favor of a unified AI assistant and enterprise coding tools.

item.title: Granola raises $125M, hits $1.5B valuation as it expands from meeting notetaker to enterprise AI app
item.description: Granola's valuation jumped from $250 million to $1.5 billion with this round, and it has added more support for AI agents after users previously complained.

item.title: Meta launches new initiative to support entrepreneurship, drive AI adoption
item.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg said in a memo to staff that small businesses have always been a big part of the company's business model, and that while tens of millions of entrepreneurs already use its...

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg and Jensen Huang are part of Trump’s new ‘tech panel’
item.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg, Oracle CTO and executive chairman Larry Ellison, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang, and Google cofounder Sergey Brin will be the first four members of the President's Council of...

item.title: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale 2026: all of the latest deals
item.description: If you’re looking for the best time to get a deal this spring, it might very well be during Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, which is happening now through 2:59AM ET on April 1st. We’re highlighting the...

item.title: GlassWorm Malware Uses Solana Dead Drops to Deliver RAT and Steal Browser, Crypto Data
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a new evolution of the GlassWorm campaign that delivers a multi-stage framework capable of comprehensive data theft and installing a remote access trojan...
